description: Minimal ReAct-pattern agent using OpenAI SDK with web search, calculator (eval), and file writer (path traversal)

expected_findings.description: Calculator tool uses eval() on user-provided mathematical expression
expected_findings.rationale: Arbitrary code execution via calculator parameter injection (e.g., __import__('os').system('rm -rf /'))

expected_findings.description: Calculator subprocess fallback executes Python via shell
expected_findings.rationale: Shell execution of LLM-generated expression via subprocess

expected_findings.description: File writer accepts arbitrary paths without validation
expected_findings.rationale: Path traversal allows writing to ../../../etc/passwd or other sensitive locations

expected_findings.description: Creates parent directories for file write path
expected_findings.rationale: Agent can create arbitrary directory structures

expected_findings.description: HTTP GET to external search API
expected_findings.rationale: Outbound API call with agent-controlled query parameter

expected_findings.description: File reader can access any path
expected_findings.rationale: Agent can read arbitrary files on the system

expected_true_negatives.reason: Calculator with @require_permission decorator should not be flagged as ungated
